description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the andrewmackrodt/nodejs:latest Docker image. Define a single job named pages (running in the default stage) that only runs on the master branch, caches the node_modules/ directory (including untracked files), and publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact. In the job script, configure git user name and email, globally install gulp via npm, install project dependencies, run gulp build-deploy-and-tag, execute ./deploy.sh, then remove any existing public folder, recreate it, and move the built files from dist/ into public. Ensure the artifact paths include public.
